title: Restore the exact 0.6.10 core-player runtime
summary: 0.6.24 stops the forward recovery loop and restores the exact 0.6.10 core-player runtime files under a fresh raw dev_deploy version boundary.
changes: Restore FASyncRuntime.cs, FASyncRuntime.MetaHarness.cs, FASyncRuntime.Player.cs, FASyncRuntime.Player.StandalonePlayback.cs, FASyncRuntime.PlayerHosted.cs, and FASyncRuntime.PlayerPresets.cs to the 0.6.10 core-player baseline from commit 9154ad5.
Stamp version 0.6.24 into player.version.json and BuildRuntimeInfo.cs.
Build the 0.6.24 raw core-player alpha seam from the restored 0.6.10 runtime.
reasoning: The user-confirmed working core-player baseline in this repo is 0.6.10, not the later 0.6.14 through 0.6.23 line.
The recovery lane drifted by trying to preserve later policy and playlist changes instead of simply going back to the last clearly working core-player runtime.
This slice intentionally uses exact repo history rather than another forward fix.
operatorVisibleOutcomes: The raw core player should behave like the last clearly working 0.6.10 baseline again.
This is a rollback slice, not a new feature slice.
knownIssues: Later runtime experiments after 0.6.10 are intentionally not carried in this rollback slice.
The live authority for this slice remains the raw core-player dev_deploy seam, not build-only .var inventory and not the hosted modern_tv witness seam.
